Intraday vol of vol | Intraday post (30/Dec)

Weekly post:

"This time is different" | Weekly post (29/Dec - 02/Jan)

Soon - maybe after New Year - I will drop a post updating the earlier “AI bubble” post. A lot of challanges are coming for 2026…

Now, let’s jump in to the daily positioning…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

Customers are buying volatility into both direction, forming a fly pattern around 6900.82, but the net speed profile is significantly negative, as way more upside vol has been bought, compared to downside.

The centroid of the profile is at 6910.75 - 6926.48 (this becomes a quite sticky zone during the PM session)

Downside pivot is at 6868.42with target of 6852.68Here, we should expect a reversion back towards 6880, and even to 6900 an pin there. Very low probability to break below this target line, but if it does, 6830/20 zone is locally supportive, with a local magnet of 6840.

Upside pivot is at 6937.57with target of 6941.10with another reversion back down towards the centroid and pin there.If vol persists, 6900

Upside vol of vol is sold, downside is barely. So, it’s like market expects a move, and more probability towards the upside target, but a reversion back, and not a squeeze-ish move.Just to be clear: vol of vol brakes volatility increase (by definition), that slows down any initial spot momentum, while keeps the fuel but uses it slowly. This says, market doesn’t want the spot to run out of its fuel on one move to the upside. They want to sustain that range.Primal pinning target is 6900.82Secondary is the centroid itself. Third is 6880.

OptionsDepth Heatmap
